body:
This PR adds support for new datalayouts:

 - `VIJHF`
 - `IJHF`
 - `IHF`
 - `VIHF`

For these new datalayouts, and other datalayouts that end with the field index, we'll be able to add fast paths for linear indexing. This will simply involve reviving https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCore.jl/pull/1922, and specializing on all datalayouts with the field index at the end.

Finally, we can compare this with our `VIJFH` datalayout performance.

To make this work with our existing implementation, users can now make horizontal spaces with a new keyword argument:
`HorizontalLayout = DataLayouts.IJFH`, which users may change to `HorizontalLayout = DataLayouts.IJHF` to try the new datalayout.
title: Add HF datalayouts
Add support for make_q_bounds with new datalayouts
